senses.def_en: in a way that goes against
senses.example: The demands they put forward run counter to the will of most people.
senses.example_zh: 他们提出的要求违背大多数人的意愿。

senses.def_en: a state of disagreement between persons or ideas

senses.example: Military conflicts are very frequent in the west bank of Jordan River and Gaza zone.
senses.example_zh: 约旦河西岸与加沙地带武装冲突频繁。

senses.example: Do American immigration laws conflict with any international laws?
senses.example_zh: 美国的移民法与国际法有抵触吗？

entries.mnemonic: con+front(前面)→在前面出现→迎面遇到

senses.def_en: (of a problem, difficulty etc.) to appear and needed to be dealt with
senses.example: The new company was confronted with many difficulties.
senses.example_zh: 这家新成立的公司面临许多困难。

senses.example: The movie star couldn't confront the rumors fabricated by people.
senses.example_zh: 那个影星无法面对人们捏造出来的谣言。

senses.example: When the police confronted her with the evidence, she admitted that she was guilty.
senses.example_zh: 当警察拿出证据与她当面对质时，她承认了自己是有罪的。

entries.mnemonic: com(共同)+pete(追求)→共同追求一个目标→竞争

senses.def_en: to strive against others to attain a goal
senses.example: Several companies are competing with each other for the contract.
senses.example_zh: 几家公司正为一份合同而互相竞争。

derivatives: competition n. 比赛；竞争 // competitor n. 竞争者，对手

senses.example: Nobody can entirely keep away from this competitive world.
senses.example_zh: 没有人能够完全远离这个竞争社会。

senses.def_en: as good as or better than others of the same kind
senses.example: Our offer is competitive and we can't lower the price any more.
senses.example_zh: 我方的报价是有竞争力的，我方不能再降价了。

senses.example: The lioness is a better hunter than the male, more fierce and more active.
senses.example_zh: 母狮是比雄狮更好的猎手，更凶猛也更活跃。

senses.example: Fierce resentment was aroused by this injustice.
senses.example_zh: 这种不公引起了强烈的不满。

senses.def_en: to supply with capital or investment funds
senses.example: They're seeking investors to capitalize the business.
senses.example_zh: 他们正在寻找资方为企业提供资金。

derivatives: capitalist n. 资本家 a. 资本主义的 // capitalism n. 资本主义

senses.example: Many international conferences are held in Geneva.
senses.example_zh: 许多国际会议在日内瓦举行。

senses.def_en: to be involved in sth.; take part (~in)
senses.example: College students are expected to participate in discussions in the class.
senses.example_zh: 大学课堂上希望学生参加讨论。

extras.content: capitalize on 利用 We should capitalize on every chance to improve our English. 我们应该充分利用一切机会来提高英语水平。
The machine would participate in interesting conversation that could continue from previous discussions. 译文：这种机器会参与到从上一次讨论中延续下来的有趣的交谈。
